default_preset_info.message: Use CopyButton + paste area for the kit. Switch structure to usePBCopy hook for the docs example (Body + Tooltip + Textarea, copy via from: hookbody).

copy_configs_info.message: Body has id="body"; CopyButton uses from="body" to copy that element’s text (value is cleared so from is used).

hook_info.message: Use the usePBCopy hook to copy text to the clipboard. This is a headless hook that you can use to copy text to the clipboard. It returns a boolean value that indicates if the text has been copied and a function to copy the text.

with_textarea.label: CopyButton + paste area
with_textarea.template: <Flex flexDirection="column" gap="sm"><CopyButton{{props}} /><Textarea marginTop="sm" placeholder="Paste copied text here" rows={3} /></Flex>

copy_from_body.label: Copy from element (from)
copy_from_body.template: <Flex flexDirection="column" gap="sm"><Body id="body">Copy this body text!</Body><CopyButton{{props}} /><Textarea marginTop="sm" placeholder="Paste copied text here" rows={3} /></Flex>

use_pbcopy_hook.label: usePBCopy hook
